name: Maple & Dried Cranberry Chicken W/Butternut S
recipeIngredient: 1 1.5 lb Chicken breast, boneless, skinless, quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the butternut squash.
2. Melt half the butter in a skillet and saute the squash and half the onion together until translucent. Stir in the cheese, parsley, and chives. Set aside.
3. Heat the olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Saute the remaining onion.
4. Add the rice and wine, stirring constantly. Reduce.
5. Add one cup of the chicken stock, stirring until absorbed. Repeat with the remaining chicken stock, adding it half at a time.
6. The rice is done when still slightly crunchy. Combine with the squash mixture.
7. Fry the chicken breasts in the remaining butter for a few minutes on each side.
8. Add the maple syrup, cranberries, and remaining chicken stock. Cook for a few minutes over low heat, or until the sauce is slightly reduced.
9. Serve over the squash risotto.
